_comment: Captured from https://registry.smithery.ai/servers?pageSize=1 on 2026-04-29 plus a synthetic null-score row to guard the optional path. Fields useCount + score are the only numeric signals Smithery's /servers list endpoint exposes; the per-server /servers/{name} detail endpoint exposes none. Keep this fixture aligned with whatever shape the live API returns.

servers.description: Fast, intelligent web search and web crawling.
Real-time trend data via one MCP connection.
